questions.question: Which of the following is a layout manager that arranges views linearly in a single line or in a vertical column?
questions.explanation: Linear Layout is used to arrange views linearly in a single line or in a vertical column.

questions.question: Which layout manager is used to position a view relative to other views on the screen?
questions.explanation: Relative Layout is used to position a view relative to other views on the screen.

questions.question: What is the primary purpose of a FrameLayout?
options: B) To position views relative to each other
C) To add views linearly or relative to each other
D) To add views in a grid
questions.explanation: FrameLayout is used to add views linearly or relative to each other.

questions.question: Which of the following is a layout manager that arranges views in a grid-like structure?
questions.explanation: Grid Layout is used to arrange views in a grid-like structure.

questions.question: Which layout manager is a subclass of ViewGroup?
questions.explanation: FrameLayout is a subclass of ViewGroup.
